CustomField.formula: 'If you receive a request from lead/contact for PERSONAL DATA DELETION, please tick the above box and forward the request e-mail to the Data Protection Officer (DPO) - dpo@carmignac.com. For further details, please refer to the 1.2.2. REQUESTS FOR PERSONAL DATA DELETION of the GDPR guide at https://home.carmignac.com/departments/Legal/RGPDDonneesPersoDataPrivacy/Forms/AllItems.aspx or contact Data Protection Officer (DPO) at dpo@carmignac.com'
CustomField.label: GDPR external comment
